name: meta-harness
description: Project-level Claude Code harness builder/manager/improver. Scores Persona, Capabilities, Runtime, and Meta-Governance against a static KB rubric using an LLM-as-judge evaluator.

commands.name: evaluate
commands.summary: Score the current project's harness on 4 axes; returns strict JSON plus a short human summary.

commands.name: build
commands.summary: Bootstrap a complete 4-bucket Claude Code harness into the current project from bundled templates; cwd-guarded with diff approval before any disk write.

commands.name: manage
commands.summary: Healthcheck a project harness: 4-bucket presence, KB drift versus the plugin manifest, and internal lint. Read-only; emits strict JSON bound to AC-9.

commands.name: improve
commands.summary: Iteratively improve a project harness via a capped 3-round (evaluate → manage → propose → approve → atomic apply → re-evaluate) loop. Two consecutive non-improvements auto-exit. AC-3 + HR-5 binding.

agents.summary: Single LLM-as-judge agent that scores 4 axes from the bundled KB rubric.

skills.summary: Procedural workflow for /meta-harness:build: cwd guard, template-variable resolution, diff preview, atomic write with snapshot rollback, and AC-1 9-path verification.
Procedural workflow for /meta-harness:manage: cwd guard, 4-bucket enumeration, KB drift detection (vendored vs plugin manifest), four-rule lint, strict JSON renderer. AC-9 binding contract.

Procedural workflow for /meta-harness:improve: 3-round cap, 8-step state machine, rule-based proposer catalogue (P1–P6), stagnation auto-exit, atomic apply with snapshot rollback. AC-3 + HR-5 binding contract.

kb.note: manifest_hash is resolved at runtime by scripts/build-kb-manifest.sh; the per-invocation value is echoed back inside the evaluator's JSON output.

hooks.note: Opt-in hooks land in M6 (PLAN §2.M6, ADR-0003). Default OFF.

future_components._comment: Hooks land in M6. They are intentionally NOT registered in the main arrays so v0.1.0 does not advertise capabilities it does not have.
